title: Show Me Your Build
description: Show & Send your friends builds or Inspect theirs!
body: # Show your friends builds or inspect theirs! ## Features: ### Inspect & View your own Build: (Keybind V & B) * Real time update armor slots, hand & off-hand, accessories, attributes and potion effects * Look at theirs or your own static skill tree ### Send Build (Snapshot): (Keybind N) * Static armor slots, hand & off-hand, accessories, attributes, potion effects and skill tree at that point of time ### Spyglass Inspect: (Keybind V) * Inspect players from long range via spyglass ### Limitations: * For live inspections, getting too far away (based on your render distance) will no longer update the build (Snapshots functions normally) ### Customizations: - Currently only the attributes section is customizable via override.json in assets/showmeyourbuild/override.json
